title: Tuberculosis (TB): regional reports 2023
body: "Annual regional reports for the recent epidemiology of tuberculosis (TB) for:   Yorkshire and Humber East of England East Midlands London North East North West South East South West West Midlands   You can see the supplementary data for these reports separately.  Annual regional reports from previous years are available online:   2021 and 2022 reports 2017, 2018 and 2019 reports 2016 reports reports from 2015 and earlier   Tuberculosis annual report data for Wales is available from the Public Health Wales website.  "
